key.name: display-timeout
key.description: How many seconds an incoming notification text should remain displayed on the panel before collapsing.

key.name: hide-when-empty
key.description: If true, the indicator button is hidden from the top panel when there are no unread notifications.

key.name: menu-width
key.description: Width of the notification popup menu in pixels.

key.name: menu-max-height
key.description: Maximum height of the scrollable notification list.

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Position of the indicator in the top panel (left, center, right).

key.name: panel-index
key.description: Sorting index in the top panel section.

key.name: banner-max-width
key.description: Maximum width of the temporary panel text in pixels.

key.name: banner-height
key.description: Height of the temporary panel text in pixels.

key.name: banner-scroll-enabled
key.description: Scroll the notification text inside the top bar if it exceeds the limit.

key.name: banner-scroll-speed
key.description: Scrolling delay in milliseconds (smaller value is faster).

key.name: show-banner-icon
key.description: Show application icon next to the banner text in the panel.

key.name: hover-to-show
key.description: Open popup menu when hovering mouse over the panel indicator.

key.name: hover-close-delay
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before closing the menu after hover out.

key.name: popover-layout
key.description: Layout style of the popover menu (calendar-notifications, notifications-calendar, notifications-only, calendar-only).

key.name: theme-style
key.description: Dropdown selection for menu style (glass, dark, solid).

key.name: indicator-icon-type
key.description: Type of top bar icon (bell, bell-badge, dot).

key.name: indicator-color
key.description: Hex color of the indicator icon.

key.name: enable-sound
key.description: Play a sound when a notification arrives.

key.name: sound-file
key.description: Path to custom sound file to play on notification.

key.name: panel-show-clock
key.description: Show current time on the top bar panel button.

key.name: panel-show-date
key.description: Show current date next to the clock in the panel.

key.name: banner-position-relative-to-clock
key.description: Select where the incoming notification banner appears relative to the clock (replace, left, right, dropdown-only).

key.name: banner-blacklist
key.description: Comma-separated list of app titles to exclude from top bar banners.

key.name: clock-format-mode
key.description: Select how to format time and date on the panel (standard, standard-with-seconds, 12h, 12h-with-seconds, two-lines, two-lines-12h, two-lines-date-day-time, custom).

key.name: clock-custom-format
key.description: GLib DateTime formatting string for the clock button when mode is set to custom.
